info.title: Universal Prediction Protocol (UPP)
info.description: Unified access to prediction markets across multiple providers via a single API

get.description: Returns 200 if the service is running and healthy
Returns 200 if the service is ready to handle requests
Returns metrics in Prometheus format
Returns service metadata for UPP discovery
Returns MCP manifest for AI agent integration
Returns list of integrated prediction market providers
Returns manifest and capabilities for a specific provider
Returns health status of a specific provider

post.description: Negotiate connection parameters with the gateway

get.description: Returns paginated list of prediction markets from all providers
Full-text search for markets by title, description, or tags
Returns detailed information about a specific market
Returns current orderbook for a market from its native provider
Returns aggregated orderbook across all related markets
Returns available market categories and taxonomies
Returns recent market resolutions
Returns details of a specific market resolution
Returns available settlement instruments and currencies
Returns available settlement handlers

post.description: Creates a new order on the specified market

get.description: Returns list of orders for the authenticated user
Returns details of a specific order

post.description: Cancels all open orders for the authenticated user
Estimates the cost and execution details of an order without placing it

get.description: Returns list of executed trades for the authenticated user
Returns current positions in the portfolio
Returns portfolio summary including PnL and allocation
Returns available balances and margin information
Returns list of available MCP tools
Returns JSON Schema for MCP types

post.description: Executes an MCP tool with provided arguments

get.description: Returns active cross-provider arbitrage opportunities sorted by net profit

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Filter by provider (bid or ask side)

get.description: Returns aggregate statistics about arbitrage scanning activity
Returns recently detected arbitrage opportunities (ring buffer)
Returns candlestick (OHLCV) price history for a market outcome at the specified resolution
Returns the current incomplete candle for a market outcome
Returns statistics about the price indexer including ticks ingested and markets tracked
Returns comprehensive portfolio analytics including P&L, risk scoring, exposure analysis, provider breakdown, and top winners/losers

post.description: Analyzes liquidity across all providers and returns an optimal routing plan (dry run, no orders placed)
Computes the optimal route and executes orders to each provider in priority order

get.description: Returns statistics about smart order routing activity
Upgrade to WebSocket for real-time streaming. Supports JSON-RPC methods: subscribe_prices, subscribe_orderbook, subscribe_arbitrage, unsubscribe, get_market, ping

timestamp.description: Period start as unix epoch seconds
